item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the emphasis on individual rights above all else.

notes: Agent A begins by disagreeing with the statement and arguing that individual rights empower innovation and personal development, then shifts toward a collective/balance critique by turn 3 and ends by saying collective well-being is equally vital. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, grounding its view in U.S. constitutional protections and individual liberty. The two agents engage specific points, but there is no clear convergence toward either side.
